description: Snapshot, run all executor segments in dependency order, then run the test suite.

evidence/{segment-id}.md.description: Evidence file per executor segment documenting files modified, integration points, and acceptance criteria satisfied

snapshot.description: Git snapshot metadata in manifest.json: branch name, stash_ref, head_sha

test-results.json.description: Test execution results with run_at, command, passed, output_summary, failing_tests (written only on test failure)

execution-log.md.description: Appended log entries for PRE_EXECUTION_SNAPSHOT, EXECUTION, TEST_EXECUTION stages

handoff-execute-audit.json.description: Handoff record confirming execute outputs are valid for audit consumption
